simple rule. I predict and also tell people making money in

Secondly maximum I tell them I am not responsible for the

Few of them show their gratitude by offering me money at
the time of help, which I repay and some times they give me
object, which I donate to others. For example a pocket pc
was given for the world cup football predictions, which I
never used it and gave it to my cousin.
In my case I take it as excellent way and opportunity to
improve my skills in mundane astrology.
